title: steiranisia heterantha
side_effects: Steiranisia heterantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can lead to skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis, while inhaling its pollen can trigger asthma attacks. If not handled carefully, the plant's oils can cause eye irritation and even temporary blindness.
